context_notes: UAT closure is one gap away. Three of four live-verifiable blocked/failed tests now pass (5 under default, 7, 8). The 18-12 fix (completed-tools sentinel in pinned [CONTEXT HISTORY]) visibly drove the agent to emit a user-facing reply on turn 2 rather than loop re-calling web_read — strong live signal. Test 4 failure is NOT a regression; it's a pre-existing structural gap surfaced only by actually exercising the pressure band. Test 3 (gateway Telegram) remains deferred and was not attempted this session.
